system.flavor: Brand your foe with a hellish seal, condemning them and crushing them under the weight of their own evil.
system.effect:
Mark a foe in range, then set out a power die at 1. When you or an ally attacks your foe, they gain [+] on the attack roll, then tick the die up by 2. At 3 or more ticks, increase this attack to [+][+] and [+][+][+] at 5 or more ticks. At 6 ticks, when your foe is hit by an attack, they explode, with the following effects:
• Hit (1) target. 2 damage and push 1 to foes, 2 vigor to allies
• Excel +1
• Critical hit: +2 damage, vigor, and push.
Then the mark ends.
